org.docgene.model

Class XMLCode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLCode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement

    public class XMLCode
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent
    Represent the content of a <code> tag.
